name: Compound
description: Exercises that involve multiple muscle groups and joints, typically focusing on overall strength and coordination.

name: Isolation
description: Exercises that target a single muscle group or joint, aiming to isolate and strengthen specific muscles.

name: Isometric
description: Exercises where muscles are engaged and held in a static position without any movement of the joint.

name: Plyometric
description: Exercises that involve explosive movements to improve strength, speed, and power, often using jumps or rapid changes in direction.

name: Cardio
description: Exercises that increase cardiovascular endurance through activities like running, cycling, or swimming.
